—
D0 — Same Day D1 — Day 1
Game Started Game Completed Game Started Game Completed
Each cell shows count of users who did [row event on D0] AND [column event on Dn], with % of that row's base cohort below. When Game Type = Singleplayer or Multiplayer and you select specific games (or, for SP, an AI bucket), the dashboard switches to per-game mode: Rows 2 & 3 use exact user-set unions across selected games via the _users columns (no double-counting). The Any/Same toggle controls the D1 numerator scope — Any includes any game (SP or MP) on D1; Same restricts to the same selected named game on D1 (SP or MP, matching current Game Type). Row 1 D1 cells always reflect campaign-level "any retention" regardless of toggle. — in Rows 2/3 D0 columns marks counts already shown in Row 1; — elsewhere marks "backwards" funnel cells. D1 cells render only when every selected registration date has fully observed its D+1 window.
